name: enrich-layer
description: Data enrichment from professional networks — company profiles, person data, work emails, contacts, job listings, and more.
long_description: Enrich Layer provides 25 tools for enriching company and person data from professional networks. Get company profiles, find employees, look up work emails, search for people and companies, and more — all directly from Claude.

tools.name: enrich_company_profile
tools.description: Get structured company data from a professional network URL

tools.name: enrich_company_lookup
tools.description: Look up a company by name or domain

tools.name: enrich_company_id_lookup
tools.description: Look up a company by numeric ID

tools.name: enrich_employee_count
tools.description: Get employee count at a company

tools.name: enrich_employee_search
tools.description: Search employees by keyword at a company

tools.name: enrich_person_profile
tools.description: Get structured person data from a profile URL

tools.name: enrich_person_lookup
tools.description: Look up a person by name and company

tools.name: enrich_role_lookup
tools.description: Find a person by role at a company

tools.name: enrich_work_email
tools.description: Get work email from a profile URL

tools.name: enrich_disposable_email
tools.description: Check if email is from a disposable provider
